evidence.scientific_clarity: 4-panel layout addresses brief's science (method overview, ablation, training curves, sensitivity sweep); Panel A diagram is readable but uses generic stage labels without domain specificity, limiting scientific impact.
evidence.typography: Script uses hardcoded fontfamily='DejaVu Sans' in LABEL_KW and never sets pdf.fonttype=42; pdffonts confirms Type 3 (bitmap) fonts — DejaVuSans, DejaVuSans-Bold, DejaVuSans-Oblique — not editable vector text.
evidence.palette: Main colors (BLUE #2176AE, ORANGE #E87722, GREEN #3BB273) are reasonably CB-safe for common deuteranopia/protanopia; green used for 'full model' max bar (directional OK) but also for Stage 3 legend (categorical overlap); viridis heatmap is CB-safe.
evidence.layout_density: Bottom panel spans full width as required; top panels use acceptable spacing; bar chart x-range (50–68) crops excess whitespace well; no overlapping labels observed; minor: feedback arc labels ('Memory','Skills') sit close to stage boxes.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Panel labels A–D are bold and upper-left as specified; legend in Panel C is frameless and compact; caption matches figure content; gridspec width_ratios=[2,1,1] implemented correctly; minor: Panel A legend strip at top is small and may be hard to read at journal size.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF uses Type 3 (bitmap) fonts — pdffonts shows EVICAO+DejaVuSans-Bold, GCWXDV+DejaVuSans-Oblique, BMQQDV+DejaVuSans all Type 3; script never calls plt.rcParams['pdf.fonttype']=42; text is not selectable/editable in the PDF.
evidence.file_format: All four required outputs exist: figure.pdf (45 kB), figure.png (132 kB), figure.svg (110 kB), caption.tex (non-trivial with panel descriptions and numerical claims), gen_figure.py (complete generation script).
evidence.caption_quality: Caption provides specific numerical findings for each panel: full model 64.7% vs –mem 55.1% drop (B); Ours loss 0.165 vs Baseline 0.360 (C); identifies high-performance region near S3–S4 (D); bold panel labels; concise and informative.

overall_strengths: Excellent caption with concrete numerical claims for each panel, directly supporting the scientific narrative.
All required file formats are present and non-trivial; layout follows the specified gridspec(2,3,width_ratios=[2,1,1]) structure with bottom panel spanning the full row.
overall_weaknesses: PDF uses Type 3 (bitmap) fonts instead of Type 42 (TrueType) — the script never sets pdf.fonttype=42 and explicitly sets fontfamily='DejaVu Sans', making text non-selectable and unsuitable for journal submission.

Color palette has a mild discipline inconsistency: green is used both as the 'best result' directional highlight in the ablation bar chart and as a categorical stage color in Panel A, which could confuse readers.
